description: Main source file for a Flutter mobile application that initializes environment settings, performs backend health checks, and renders a simple UI indicating backend connectivity status.

classes.name: _BackendHealthClient
classes.description: A helper class responsible for checking the health status of the backend server via an HTTP GET request.

classes.name: _HealthResult
classes.description: A class representing the result of a health check, including success/failure status, optional error message, and response details.

classes.name: _HomePage
classes.description: A stateful widget that manages the UI for displaying backend health status and rechecking capability.

classes.name: _HomePageState
classes.description: State class for _HomePage, managing health check process, UI updates, and rendering logic.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Application entry point that initializes Flutter bindings, loads environment variables, and runs the app.

methods.name: checkHealth
methods.description: Performs an HTTP GET request to the backend URL to assess its health status, returning a _HealthResult.

methods.name: _kickoffHealthCheck
methods.description: Triggers the backend health check and updates the UI based on the result.
